span.p:
Model router modelRouterSelect() / resolveModelSpec(spec,mainLoop,override,permMode)
opus-4-7 / opus-4-6 / sonnet-4-6 / haiku
xhigh_effort→4-7 / max_effort→4-6
CLAUDE_CODE_SUBAGENT_MODEL override
[1m] tier suffix: useOneMillionCtx()&&!suppressTierSuffix()
inherit path via inheritModelSpec()
